experiences: Location-Based Discovery: Designed an intuitive map and list interface leveraging geolocation, allowing users to effortlessly discover and track nearby "yellow-label" discounted products at local supermarkets.

Seamless O2O Checkout Flow: Engineered a frictionless Online-to-Offline user journey that enables users to either reserve discounted items in-app or navigate to the physical store to complete transactions via an integrated scan-to-pay system.

High-Fidelity Design & Branding: Developed a vibrant, user-centric mobile UI incorporating playful 3D mascot assets to boost engagement, supported by a scalable Figma Design System to maintain visual consistency across all screens.

Engineered a streamlined peer-to-peer (P2P) trading journey, implementing intuitive visual feedback for blockchain transaction states and smart contract execution to ensure user confidence and transparency.
High-Fidelity Design: Created a comprehensive design system in Figma for the Admin Treasury and Building Wallet, supporting real-time monitoring of energy consumption and token balances.

Cross-functional Integration: Bridged the gap between complex blockchain backend logic and frontend UI by designing clear error-handling states and transaction feedback loops, reducing user friction during network latency events.
3D Interface Implementation: Developed 3D visualization models within FineVis to enhance facility monitoring and operational overview.

API & Real-Time Integration: Configured dynamic data layers and event triggers to link live CCTV feeds and real-time API data directly to dashboard components, creating a responsive and immersive user experience.
Design Leadership: Led the UI/UX design team for a comprehensive accounting web application.
Figma Design System: Architected and maintained a robust Design System in Figma to ensure design consistency and accelerate the hand-off process between design and engineering teams.
